truth: Black #23 grabs the defensive rebound in the paint with two defenders near him, tries an outlet pass up the floor in transition, but it is a bad pass to a teammate who was not ready and a defender grabs it. He never dribbles after the rebound.
tracked_player: black #23 — grabs the rebound in the paint, on offense
